checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.novaPoshtaDesc: Delivery to a branch or parcel locker
checkout.wayforpayDesc: Visa/Mastercard, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Installments

ordersBoard.title: Orders board
ordersBoard.intro: Drag cards between columns to change status. Allowed transitions highlight green while dragging.
ordersBoard.truncatedSuffix: (newest first). The rest are hidden to keep the board readable — use the

ordersDetail.packModeTitle: Hide everything except items and delivery address — for packing
ordersDetail.createTtnViaApi: Or create via Nova Poshta API
ordersDetail.notePlaceholder: Add a note for the team (auto-saved on blur)…
ordersDetail.sendPhotoPrompt: Send photo of {name} to customer via Telegram/Viber?

ask.title: 🤖 Ask the admin panel
ask.intro: Describe what you're looking for in natural language. I'll take you to the right page with ready filters.
ask.notUnderstood: Couldn't understand. Try one of the examples below.
ask.nlNotice: 💡 Currently a keyword-based NL router. LLM (Claude/GPT) integration is on the backlog.

notFoundLog.title: 404 log
notFoundLog.intro: All pages that visitors requested but don't exist. Look for broken internal links or add slug redirects.
notFoundLog.empty: Log is empty. Either the site is bug-free, or nobody hit a 404 since the last deploy.

homepageBlocks.title: Homepage blocks
homepageBlocks.intro: Drag blocks by the ⠿ handle to reorder. Toggle off the ones you don't need.
homepageBlocks.conflictToast: Layout changed in another session — reload the page
homepageBlocks.seoHint: Shown in the "SEO text block" (enable it above). HTML is allowed: headings, paragraphs, lists, links.

feedsPage.hotline_desc: Ukrainian product and price aggregator. Attached in the Hotline seller cabinet.
feedsPage.hotline_useCase: Hotline pulls the feed every 30 min and updates prices/availability on the aggregator.
feedsPage.google_desc: RSS 2.0 standard + g:namespace for Google Shopping. Includes g:google_product_category and g:shipping.
feedsPage.google_useCase: In Merchant Center → Products → Feeds → Scheduled fetch → URL.
feedsPage.facebook_desc: Same format as Google Merchant — Meta Commerce Manager compatible. Used for Dynamic Ads on IG/FB.
feedsPage.facebook_useCase: Commerce Manager → Catalog → Data source → Scheduled feed.
feedsPage.title: Price feeds (XML)
feedsPage.intro: Automatic product feeds for aggregators and ad platforms. Generated on request, cached for 30 min. Only active in-stock products with photos.
feedsPage.stepCopy: Copy the URL of the feed above.
feedsPage.stepAdd: In the aggregator/platform dashboard add a 'Scheduled feed' with this URL.
feedsPage.stepInterval: Refresh interval — 30–60 minutes, enough to sync prices and stock.
feedsPage.stepAuth: Feeds are public (no auth). If you need authentication — add an API key via

duplicatesPage.title: Product duplicates
duplicatesPage.intro: Fuzzy-match algorithm. Review pairs — they may be the same product under different codes.
duplicatesPage.empty: No duplicates above the selected threshold.

pricingParity.title: Pricing Parity
pricingParity.intro: Listings where the marketplace price may differ from the site (sync errors or stale).
pricingParity.empty: 🎉 All listings synced on time. Pricing parity OK.

imageQualityPage.title: Image quality
imageQualityPage.intro: Products needing re-shoots or metadata fixes.
imageQualityPage.empty: All good for the selected filter.

searchIntelPage.title: Customer search analysis
searchIntelPage.intro: What people search for on the site, especially with no results — those are lost sales.
searchIntelPage.generateHint: Click "Generate" — AI will analyze zero-result queries and suggest concrete actions (add product, synonym, category).
searchIntelPage.zeroResultsSubtitle: {count} queries — customers searched but found nothing
searchIntelPage.zeroResultsEmpty: No zero-result queries yet. That's good!
searchIntelPage.topQueriesEmpty: No data yet — need to wait for users to search.

stockCountsPage.title: Stock count
stockCountsPage.intro: Snapshot stock → scan → close with adjustment

reportBuilderPage.title: Report builder
reportBuilderPage.intro: Pick a dimension and metrics — you'll see a grouped table. Export to CSV for Excel/Google Sheets.

billingPlansPage.title: Pricing plans
billingPlansPage.intro: Pick the plan that suits your business best.
billingPlansPage.overflowProducts: Products now: {used}, new plan limit: {limit}. Existing products stay, but new ones can't be added until brought into compliance.
billingPlansPage.overflowOrders: Orders this period: {used}, new plan limit: {limit}. New orders will be blocked for this period.
billingPlansPage.confirmChange:
Confirm plan change from "{from}" to "{to}"?

Billing cycle resets to today and you'll be charged for a full month of the new plan (proration not yet implemented).

marketplaceDisputesPage.title: Marketplace disputes
marketplaceDisputesPage.intro: Buyer complaints needing a reply. Deadlines in red.
marketplaceDisputesPage.emptyHint: Disputes sync on every request. Click "Refresh" to reload.

palletDeliveryPage.title: Pallet delivery
palletDeliveryPage.regionsHint: Multiplier applies to base price for a specific region (1.0 — no markup, 1.5 — +50%, 0.9 — −10%).
palletDeliveryPage.noRegions: No regions set — base price will apply to all addresses.
palletDeliveryPage.confirmSaveMsg: Changes apply immediately to all orders. Continue?

domainsPage.title: Custom domain
domainsPage.verifyHint: Add a TXT record to your domain's DNS settings:
domainsPage.verifyAfterHint: After adding the record, wait a few minutes for DNS propagation and click the button below.
domainsPage.dnsNotFound: DNS record not found. Make sure the TXT record is added.
domainsPage.removeHint: Removing the domain will make the store available only on the default address.
domainsPage.confirmRemoveMsg: Are you sure you want to remove the domain link? This cannot be undone.

pickListPage.title: Pick-list (order picking)
pickListPage.intro: List of all items to pick for unconfirmed orders across all marketplaces. Check off positions as you pick.

webhooksPage.title: Webhooks
webhooksPage.intro: External URLs the platform pings on events (new order, payment, etc.). The X-Webhook-Signature header carries HMAC-SHA256 of the body with the secret key.

faqCategoriesPage.title: FAQ categories
faqCategoriesPage.empty: No categories yet. Create the first one to structure your FAQ.
faqCategoriesPage.confirmDelete: Delete category "{name}"? Questions belonging to it stay but lose their link.

marketplaceAuditPage.title: Webhook event log
marketplaceAuditPage.intro: Recent requests from marketplaces. Kept for 30 days.

healthPage.title: System status
healthPage.sentryEmpty: Sentry returns no errors or is not configured (SENTRY_ORG / SENTRY_PROJECT / SENTRY_API_TOKEN).
healthPage.deployEmpty: git is unavailable or this is not a git checkout.

adminChatPage.title: Support chats
adminChatPage.emptyHint: Customers will start conversations via the on-site chat

uptimeSparkline.uptime: Availability ({count, plural, one {# check} other {# checks}}):

webhookUrlBlock.label: Webhook URL for the marketplace
webhookUrlBlock.helpText: Paste this URL into the webhook settings in the marketplace dashboard. A «new order» event will be delivered here.

onboardingWizard.title: 👋 Connect your first marketplace
onboardingWizard.subtitle: Expand your reach — publish products on the leading Ukrainian platforms in a couple of clicks.
onboardingWizard.freeNote: 💡 Integration is free. Only the marketplaces themselves take a sales commission (5-25%).

autoSyncSettings.cronNote: Settings are applied by the cron jobs `marketplace-health-check` / `sync-marketplace-*`.

autoCrosslistSettings.enableLabel: Automatically publish new active products to all enabled marketplaces
autoCrosslistSettings.runDisabledTitle: Enable and save, then you can run it
autoCrosslistSettings.cronNote: Cron runs periodically (needs to be set up in the system scheduler — /api/v1/cron/marketplace-auto-crosslist). Each product is published ONCE per marketplace — repeated runs skip already-published ones.

compareModal.title: Compare marketplaces
compareModal.footer: {left} vs {right} — pick a platform at the top of each column.

messagesTab.searchHint: Try a different search query or reset the filters.
messagesTab.emptyHint: Buyer messages from marketplaces will appear here. They sync automatically via cron, or click “Refresh”.

analyticsTab.profitTitle: Revenue minus marketplace commission. Configured in Settings → “Marketplace commission, %”.
analyticsTab.noCommissionNote: 💡 Profit is shown as revenue because no marketplace commission is set. Enter “Marketplace commission, %” in the API settings of each connected marketplace for more accurate figures.
analyticsTab.commissionColTitle: This marketplace's commission for the period

historyTab.retryInProgress: Publication to this channel is already running
historyTab.bulkRetryCancelled: Cancelled. Done: {ok} ok, {fail} errors, {inProgress} already running
historyTab.noExternalId: None of the selected has an externalId
historyTab.delistConfirm: Delete “{title}” from {name}? The listing will be removed on the marketplace. This action cannot be undone.
historyTab.bulkDelistConfirm: Delist {n} published listings from marketplaces? This action cannot be undone.

productsTab.notConfiguredToast: {name} is not configured. Go to the “API settings” tab.
productsTab.syncHint: Updates prices and stock for {count} products
productsTab.notConfiguredHint: Go to the “API settings” tab to add API keys
productsTab.mpLockedTitle: You can't change the marketplace during publishing

marketplacesShared.desc_epicentrk: Publish products on the Epicentr K marketplace
marketplacesShared.docs_olx: How to get OLX API keys
marketplacesShared.ph_webhookSecret: Secret for verifying the webhook signature
marketplacesShared.help_clientId: Create an OLX app at developer.olx.ua → Manage Apps. The Client ID is shown on the app page.
marketplacesShared.help_accessToken: Generate it via OLX OAuth 2.0 authorization. The token is valid for up to 30 days — refresh it on a 401 error.
marketplacesShared.help_defaultCategoryId: Default OLX category ID for new ads. List: https://developer.olx.ua/api/data/category
marketplacesShared.help_cityId: OLX city ID (1 = Kyiv). City list in the OLX documentation.
marketplacesShared.help_webhookSecret_olx: Secret from OLX for verifying the webhook HMAC signature. In production all POSTs are blocked (503) without it — otherwise an attacker could send fake events. Not optional in prod.
marketplacesShared.help_priceMarkupPercent: Markup on the base price (can be negative). For example, 5 = +5%, -3 = -3%. Range ±50%.
marketplacesShared.help_stockAllocationPercent: What % of the total stock to show on this marketplace. 100 = all stock, 30 = 30%. Useful for splitting stock across marketplaces and avoiding overselling.
marketplacesShared.help_commissionPercent: Average sales commission of this marketplace (5-25%). Used to calculate net profit in Analytics. Leave 0 if unknown — only revenue will be shown.
marketplacesShared.help_clientSecret: Needed to refresh the Access Token via refresh_token. Find it in the OLX developer console next to the Client ID.
marketplacesShared.help_refreshToken: Issued together with the access_token during authorization. Used to auto-refresh expired tokens.
marketplacesShared.help_apiKey_rozetka: Seller cabinet → Settings → API. Copy the Seller API token.
marketplacesShared.help_sellerId_rozetka: Numeric store ID from the seller cabinet (to the right of the store name).
marketplacesShared.help_webhookSecret_rozetka: Secret from the webhook settings in the Rozetka cabinet for verifying the HMAC signature. In production all POSTs are blocked (503) without it. Not optional in prod.
marketplacesShared.help_apiToken_prom: Prom cabinet → Settings → API access → Create token. Grant "Read + Write" rights.
marketplacesShared.help_webhookSecret_prom: Secret from the webhook settings in the Prom cabinet for verifying the HMAC signature. In production all POSTs are blocked (503) without it. Not optional in prod.
marketplacesShared.help_apiKey_epicentrk: Epicentr seller cabinet → Settings → API → Generate key.
marketplacesShared.help_sellerId_epicentrk: Seller ID from the Epicentr cabinet.
marketplacesShared.help_webhookSecret_epicentrk: Secret from the webhook settings in the Epicentr cabinet for verifying the HMAC signature. In production all POSTs are blocked (503) without it. Not optional in prod.

settingsTab.confirmEmpty:
You left these fields empty: {fields}.

If you save now, these credentials will be erased and {name} will stop working until you enter new values.

Really save empty?
settingsTab.introBanner: First connection? Step-by-step instructions for getting tokens for each marketplace are in the Help. Hover over the icon next to each field for a short explanation.
settingsTab.rateTitle: API calls in the last 5 min (current process). Limit {limit}/5min.
settingsTab.sandboxNote: 🧪 Sandbox / dry-run — don't make real requests. Useful for testing (products are “published” with fake IDs, without calling the marketplace API).
settingsTab.clearFieldTitle: Clear the field to enter a new token
settingsTab.testTitle: Test the connection to the marketplace API
settingsTab.refreshTokenTitle: Refresh the OLX Access Token via refresh_token
settingsTab.autoSyncDesc: Periodic sync via cron. Settings are stored in the database.
settingsTab.autoCrosslistDesc: Automatically publish new active products to all enabled marketplaces without a manual click.

commandPalette.hint: Tip: enter a phone, email or SKU to find a customer/order/product

adminLayout.loggedInAs: You are logged in as (role: {role}). Access requires the admin or manager role.
adminLayout.loginPrompt: Log in to your administrator account to access the control panel.
adminLayout.maintenanceActiveTitle: Site is under maintenance — click to enable
adminLayout.enable2faPrompt: Enable two-factor authentication to protect your account
adminLayout.section2faDesc: To access critical settings (payments, users, audit log, general settings) the administrator must enable 2FA. It protects the account from unauthorized access even if the password is compromised.
adminLayout.enable2faHint: It takes a minute — add an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password) and you'll have full access again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: The admin panel home page with the store's key metrics.
steps: Review today's order, revenue and new-customer stats
Drag widgets to change their display order
Click the eye to hide/show a widget
Enable auto-refresh to track orders in real time
tips: New-order notifications appear automatically
Ctrl+K — quick navigation between sections

orders.title: Orders
orders.description: Manage all store orders. View, filter, change statuses and export.
steps: Use search by number, name, phone or tracking number
Filter by status, customer type, payment or delivery method
For a quick status change click the pencil icon in the order row
Click the order number to view details
tips: New orders are highlighted with a badge at the top
Stats refresh every 30 seconds
XLSX export is available via the "Export" button

products.title: Products
products.description: Manage the product catalog. Adding, editing, bulk operations.
steps: Search runs automatically as you type (with a 400ms delay)
Open filters to search by category, status or stock
Select products with checkboxes for bulk actions (activate, deactivate, change category)
Click the product name to edit
tips: Sorting by category helps quickly find the products you need
Products with zero stock are highlighted in red

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage customers, wholesale requests and roles.
steps: Search by email, name, phone or company name
To approve a wholesale request select a group (Wholesale 1/2/3) and click "Yes"
Click the name to view the user's profile
tips: The "Pending" wholesale status is highlighted with color
Blocked accounts have a red badge

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Detailed analytics for sales, products, customers and channels.
steps: Choose the analysis period: 7, 30 or 90 days
Switch between tabs for different analytics types
Export reports to CSV or PDF
tips: The "Funnel" tab shows conversion from view to purchase
ABC analysis helps identify the most profitable products

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Generate business reports in XLSX, CSV and PDF formats.
steps: Choose a report type from the template list
Set parameters (period, status) and click "Generate"
The file downloads automatically in the selected format
tips: You can build a custom report via the builder
Reports are generated on the server — large files may take a few seconds

categories.title: Categories
steps: Drag categories to change the display order
Click "Edit" to change the name, slug or visibility
To merge categories click "Merge" — all products will move over
Subcategories are shown indented under the parent
tips: Maximum of 8 parent categories
A category with products can't be deleted — move the products first

pages.title: Static pages
pages.description: Manage the site's static pages (About, Delivery, Returns, etc.).
steps: Click "Edit" to change the page content
The slug defines the page URL (e.g. /pages/delivery)
tips: "Draft" pages are not shown on the site
Changes take effect immediately after saving

faq.title: FAQ
steps: Click "Add question" to create a new entry
Group questions by category for easy navigation
Enable/disable publication of each question separately
Sort by order, name or click count

import.title: Import
import.description: Upload and update products from files (CSV, XLSX).
steps: Upload a file in .xlsx, .xls or .csv format
Review the preview before confirming the import
After import review the log with the number of created, updated and skipped products
tips: Standard format: Code, Name, Category, Retail price, Wholesale price
A price list with 4 prices (Retail, Wholesale1, Wholesale2, Wholesale3) updates prices automatically

publications.title: Publications
publications.description: Publish content to social networks and marketplaces.
steps: Create a publication: enter a title, text, choose channels
Use templates for quick creation (New product, Sale, News)
Attach a product to auto-fill data (price, name, link)
Schedule the publication for a specific date or publish immediately
tips: The variables {productName}, {productPrice} are replaced automatically
You can set separate text for each channel

badges.title: Product badges
badges.description: Manage badges (stickers) on product cards: Sale, New, Hit, etc.
steps: Click "Add badge" and specify the product ID and badge type
For a custom badge enter your own text and choose a color
Priority defines the display order when there are multiple badges

personalPrices.title: Personal prices
personalPrices.description: Individual prices or discounts for specific customers.
steps: Click "Add" and specify the user ID
Choose a product or category for the personal price
Set a discount in % or a fixed price
Set a validity period (optional)

wholesaleRules.title: Wholesale rules
wholesaleRules.description: Configure rules for wholesale buyers: minimum amount, multiplicity, limits.
steps: Click "Add rule" and choose a type
Min. amount — minimum order amount for wholesalers
Multiplicity — a product can only be ordered in multiples
Enable/disable the rule with the status button

referrals.title: Referrals
referrals.description: Manage the referral program: who invited whom, bonuses.
steps: View referrers and invited users
To award a bonus click "Award bonus" and enter the amount
Filter by status: registered, first order, bonus awarded

loyalty.title: Loyalty program
loyalty.description: Configure loyalty tiers and manage points manually.
steps: Edit tiers (bronze/silver/gold/platinum): min. spend, points multiplier, discount
Add a new tier with the "Add tier" button
Use the form below for manual crediting/debiting of points
tips: Points are credited automatically when an order is completed

emailTemplates.title: Email templates
emailTemplates.description: Edit email templates (order confirmation, registration, etc.).
steps: Click "Edit" to change the subject and body of the email
Use the variables: {name}, {orderNumber}, {status}, {link}, {amount}
Send a test email to check the appearance
Enable/disable the template with the status button

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.description: Manage customer requests: contact forms, callbacks.
steps: Click a request to view details
Click "Processed" or "Reject" to change the status
Filter by type (form, call) and status

channels.title: Channel statistics
channels.description: Overview of subscriber and publication stats in Telegram, Viber, Instagram.
steps: View the number of subscribers, new and unsubscribed
A list of recent publications with distribution channels

channelSettings.title: Channel settings
channelSettings.description: Connect social networks and marketplaces via API.
steps: Enable a channel with the toggle
Enter the API keys (Bot Token, Access Token, etc.)
Click "Test connection" to verify
Click "Save" — keys are encrypted and masked
tips: Sensitive data (tokens) are shown masked
On re-save, masked values are NOT overwritten

botSettings.title: Bot settings
botSettings.description: Manage welcome messages and bot auto-replies.
steps: Review the welcome messages for each platform
Add an auto-reply: enter a keyword and reply text
Choose a platform or "All" for a universal reply

moderation.title: Moderation
moderation.description: Automatic message moderation rules in bots.
steps: Create a rule: choose a platform, type (stop words, link blocking, flood) and action
Set the configuration in JSON format (example shown below)
Review the moderation log on the "Log" tab
Mark false positives with the "False" button

marketplaces.title: Marketplaces
marketplaces.description: Publish products to OLX, Rozetka, Prom.ua and Epicentr K.
steps: "Publish" tab: choose products, a marketplace and click "Publish"
"History" tab: view all publications with filters
"Messages" tab: messages from marketplace buyers
"API settings" tab: API keys for each marketplace
tips: The "Sync prices" button updates prices on the marketplace
The "Only unpublished" filter helps avoid duplicating products
Auto-sync is configured on the "API settings" tab

settings.title: General settings
settings.description: Core site data: name, contacts, legal information, SEO, analytics.
steps: Switch between tabs: General, Legal information, Social, SEO
Fill in the fields and click "Save"
The phone must be in the +380XXXXXXXXX format
The IBAN is validated automatically (UA + 27 digits)
tips: Changes take effect immediately for all visitors
The EDRPOU must contain exactly 8 digits

paymentSettings.title: Payment systems
paymentSettings.description: Configure payment methods: LiqPay, Monobank, WayForPay, cash on delivery.
steps: Enable the desired payment method with the toggle
Enter the API keys from the payment system's dashboard
Click "Test connection" to verify
Copy the Webhook URL and paste it in the payment system's dashboard
tips: Sandbox mode for LiqPay — test payments without real money
The minimum amount for online payment limits small transactions

deliverySettings.title: Delivery services
deliverySettings.description: Configure Nova Poshta, Ukrposhta and pickup.
steps: Enable a delivery service with the toggle
For Nova Poshta: enter the API Key and sender details
Click "Test connection" to verify the API key
Set the free-delivery threshold (optional)
tips: The tracking number is created automatically when the status changes to "Shipped"
A fixed cost can be set instead of an API calculation

smtpSettings.title: Email / SMTP
smtpSettings.description: Configure the mail server for sending emails to customers.
steps: Enter the SMTP server details (host, port, login, password)
For Gmail use an App Password (not the main password)
Click "Test connection" to verify
Enter an email and send a test message
tips: SSL/TLS is usually on port 465, STARTTLS on 587
For SendGrid/Mailgun use their SMTP details

homepage.title: Homepage blocks
homepage.description: Manage the order and visibility of blocks on the homepage.
steps: Drag blocks to change the order
Enable/disable a block with the button
Click "Save" to apply changes
tips: Disabled blocks are not shown to visitors
The first block is the most prominent on the page

banners.title: Banners / Slider
steps: Click "Add" to create a new banner
Hover over the image and click to upload a new photo
Drag banners to change the order
Enable/disable a banner with the status button

themes.title: Themes
themes.description: Manage the site's color scheme and themes.
steps: Click "Colors" to change the theme's color palette
Preview the changes before saving
Click "Activate" to apply the theme on the site
Upload a ZIP file to add a new theme

seoTemplates.title: SEO templates
seoTemplates.description: Automatically generate meta tags for products and categories.
steps: Create a template using the variables: {name}, {code}, {category}, {price}
Click the eye to preview the result
"Bulk generation" — applies the template to all products without meta tags

seoAudit.title: SEO audit
seoAudit.description: Check the site for SEO issues: broken links, missing meta tags.
steps: Click "Run audit" to start the check
Review the issues found and the recommendations
tips: It's recommended to run the audit after bulk product changes
Products without a Meta Title lose ranking in search

palletDelivery.title: Pallet delivery
palletDelivery.description: Configure delivery of large orders by pallet.
steps: Enable/disable pallet delivery
Set min/max weight, base price and price per kg
Add regions with multipliers for different costs
tips: A 1.5 multiplier for a region means +50% to the base price
The free-delivery threshold works separately from the regular one

auditLog.title: Audit log
auditLog.description: History of all admin and manager actions in the system.
steps: Filter by action type, user or date
Click an entry to view details
Export the log to CSV for external analysis
tips: The log keeps all changes: creation, editing, deletion
Useful for auditing and investigating incidents

ordersDetail.title: Order details
ordersDetail.description: Full order information: customer, products, payment, delivery, change history.
steps: Change the order status via the dropdown at the top
Assign a responsible manager
Add or change the tracking number (Nova Poshta waybill number)
Click "Invoice" or "Delivery note" to generate PDF documents
Edit the products in the order with the "Edit" button
Send a product photo to the customer via Telegram/Viber
tips: The tracking number is created automatically when the status changes to "Shipped"
The manager note is visible only to the team, the customer doesn't see it
The change history at the bottom shows who changed the status and when

productsDetail.title: Edit product
productsDetail.description: Full product editing: name, prices, images, description, SEO.
steps: Upload images by clicking "+" in the images section
Fill in the basic info: name, code, category
Set prices: retail and 3 wholesale tiers
Add an HTML description via the WYSIWYG editor
Fill in the SEO fields (Meta Title up to 70 characters, Description up to 160)
Click "Save changes"
tips: A watermark is added automatically to photos (full and medium sizes)
The "Publish to social" button creates a publication with the product data
Price history expands when you click the block at the bottom

usersDetail.title: User profile
usersDetail.description: Detailed user information: orders, loyalty, wholesale status.
steps: Review the customer's order history
Change the role or wholesale group
Block or unblock the account

marketplacesHelp.title: Help: marketplace integrations
marketplacesHelp.subtitle: Step-by-step instructions for configuring and working with OLX, Rozetka, Prom.ua and Epicentr K.
marketplacesHelp.overviewIntro: The admin panel lets you manage products across four marketplaces in one place: OLX, Rozetka, Prom.ua and Epicentr K. From the panel you can:
marketplacesHelp.overviewLi1: publish products (with automatic markup and stock quota);
marketplacesHelp.overviewLi2: import orders from all marketplaces (automatically via cron);
marketplacesHelp.overviewLi3: reply to buyer messages right from the admin;
marketplacesHelp.overviewLi5: see sales analytics and API health.
marketplacesHelp.overviewNote: Basic flow: 1) in "API settings" enter the tokens and click Test connection; 2) in the "Publish products" tab select a product and click Publish; 3) orders arrive automatically every 30 min; 4) reply to messages from the "Messages" tab.
marketplacesHelp.olxStep1: Register at the OLX Partner Portal as a seller.
marketplacesHelp.olxStep2: Create a new integration (Application). In the settings specify the Redirect URI: https://pulito.trade/api/v1/admin/marketplaces/olx/oauth-callback.
marketplacesHelp.olxStep3: Get the client_id and client_secret. Enter them in the OLX form under "API settings".
marketplacesHelp.olxStep4: Click Run OAuth — an OLX window opens. Grant permission — the tokens are pulled in automatically.
marketplacesHelp.olxNote: The token is valid for ~30 days. Cron refreshes it automatically. If you see ⚠ Token expired in the badge next to the marketplace — click Refresh token.
marketplacesHelp.rozetkaStep2: Create an API key. Copy and save it in the API Key field.
marketplacesHelp.rozetkaStep3: Specify the Seller ID — your numeric seller ID, visible in the cabinet URL.
marketplacesHelp.rozetkaStep4: Click Test connection. If the response is Rozetka Seller #... — everything is correct.
marketplacesHelp.promStep1: In the Prom.ua cabinet → API generate a token with the "Products", "Orders", "Messages" permissions.
marketplacesHelp.promStep2: Paste it into the API Token field and save.
marketplacesHelp.epicentrkStep1: Contact your Epicentr K manager for the API key for the marketplace.epicentrk.ua marketplace.
marketplacesHelp.epicentrkStep2: Paste it into the API Key field.
marketplacesHelp.epicentrkNote: Epicentr K has no API for replying to messages from buyers — reply via the seller's web cabinet. The rest of the features (publishing, orders, returns) work.
marketplacesHelp.workflowStep1: Category mapping. Go to Marketplaces → Category mapping. Map local categories to each marketplace's categories. Without mapping, products are published to the default category.
marketplacesHelp.workflowStep2: Set up markup. In Settings → Markup specify a percentage or fixed amount for each marketplace (compensates the marketplace commission).
marketplacesHelp.workflowStep3: Stock quota. The stockAllocationPercent field (0-100) — what percentage of local stock to show on this marketplace. Protects against overselling when selling in several places at once.
marketplacesHelp.workflowStep4: Publish. In the Publish products tab select products and click Publish to the desired marketplace.
marketplacesHelp.workflowStep5: Stock syncs automatically — after each imported order the local stock decreases, and the new value is sent to all marketplaces where the product is published.
marketplacesHelp.messagesIntro: The Messages tab combines buyer messages from all marketplaces.
marketplacesHelp.messagesLi1: Filters: by marketplace, by manager, unread only, unanswered only.
marketplacesHelp.messagesLi2: Assignment. The "no manager" dropdown next to each message lets you distribute work among admins/managers.
marketplacesHelp.messagesLi3: Templates. Create ready-made replies in API messages (POST /api/v1/admin/marketplaces/reply-templates). Insert them into a reply with one click.
marketplacesHelp.messagesLi4: SLA indicator. ⏱ next to a message shows the wait time. Yellow > 1 h, red > 4 h — take the hottest ones first.
marketplacesHelp.returnsPara1: Marketplaces → Returns: synced via cron over the last 30 days. The Confirm / Reject / Complete buttons change the status and automatically push the decision to the marketplace (where the API supports it: Rozetka, Prom). For OLX and Epicentr K the status is updated only locally — the decision must be confirmed in the seller's cabinet.
marketplacesHelp.returnsPara2: Marketplaces → Disputes: aggregates complaints from OLX and Rozetka. Disputes with a deadline < 24 h are highlighted in red — they must be answered in the marketplace cabinet.
marketplacesHelp.tsRedBadge: Click Test connection. If the error persists — check the token, it may have expired. For OLX — click Refresh token.
marketplacesHelp.tsInvalidCategory: Go to Category mapping and add a match for the product's local category. Without mapping, the default is used (which often fails validation).
marketplacesHelp.tsOversell: The order went through on the marketplace, but locally the product was already out of stock. Look at the order (the Telegram message contains a link) and decide: reorder, cancel, or offer the customer an alternative.
marketplacesHelp.tsCredsGone: Fixed 2026-05-17: token fields are now protected — to change a token you must click Change. An empty value does not overwrite the token.
marketplacesHelp.tsCronNoImport: Check /api/v1/cron/sync-marketplace-orders — the endpoint returns JSON with results per marketplace. If failed: -1 — there is a connection error.
marketplacesHelp.footerNote: More documentation: the technical reference is in the MARKETPLACES.md file at the repo root.

settingsPage.h_site_name: Shown in the browser title and emails

settingsPage.v_integer_uah: Must be an integer in UAH

settingsPage.h_default_seo_title: Title for pages without their own SEO title (up to 70 characters)
settingsPage.h_facebook_pixel_id: Numeric ID from the Meta Ads account
settingsPage.v_pixel: Pixel ID must be a number
settingsPage.h_pinterest_tag_id: ID from Pinterest Business → Conversions → Pinterest Tag (13-digit number)
settingsPage.v_pinterest_tag: Tag ID must be a number of 10-20 digits
settingsPage.h_pinterest_domain_verify: Value from the p:domain_verify meta tag in Pinterest Business → Claim domain
settingsPage.h_loyalty_welcome_bonus: Granted immediately when any new user registers. 0 — disabled. 1 point = 1 ₴ discount.
settingsPage.h_referral_referrer_bonus: How many points the inviter gets when a friend places their first order. 0 — disabled.
settingsPage.h_referral_referee_bonus: Extra points for a new user who registered with someone's referral code — granted on the first order. 0 — disabled.
settingsPage.f_loyalty_max_redemption_percent: Max % of order payable with points
settingsPage.h_loyalty_max_redemption_percent: What % of the order amount (goods + delivery) a customer can pay with points. 50 — half, 100 — all. 0 — no limit.
settingsPage.title: Site settings
settingsPage.confirmMsg: Are you sure you want to save the changes to the site settings? Changes take effect immediately.
settingsPage.palletConfirmMsg: Changes to the pallet delivery settings take effect immediately.
settingsPage.aiKeysHint: Keys are stored in the DB and take priority over the corresponding environment variables (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / GEMINI_API_KEY). If a field is empty — the value from .env is used. Saved keys are masked (••••XXXX) on the next load; keep the mask to leave the key unchanged.
settingsPage.claudeHintBefore: Best quality, ~$0.02 per generation. Get a key:
settingsPage.geminiHintBefore: Cheap alternative (~$0.0005 on gemini-1.5-flash). Get a key:
settingsPage.aiConfirmMsg: Changes take effect immediately. If you left the mask (••••), the saved key won't change.

adminBannersPage.variantGroupTitle: Banners with the same group are shown randomly with variantWeight
adminBannersPage.variantWeightTitle: Higher = shown more often among variants in this group
adminBannersPage.emptyHint: Banners are slides at the top of the homepage. Add the first to draw attention to promotions.

publicationTemplatesPage.title: Publication templates
publicationTemplatesPage.emptyHint: Create your first template — and use it when creating publications

adminTenantsPage.title: Tenants (SaaS)
adminTenantsPage.deleteMsg: Delete tenant? All related data will be removed.

marketplaceCategoriesPage.title: Category mapping
marketplaceCategoriesPage.intro: Map local categories to marketplace category IDs. Products without mapping publish to the default category — that's often why listings get rejected.
marketplaceCategoriesPage.copyConfirm: Copy mapping from {from} to {to}? Existing entries are not overwritten.
marketplaceCategoriesPage.warnLine: ⚠ {products} active products from {categories} categories have no mapping on {name} — they will fall into the default category (may be rejected by the marketplace).
marketplaceCategoriesPage.warnIconTitle: Active products without mapping — will fall to default
marketplaceCategoriesPage.hint: Leave the field empty to skip mapping. Click «Save» to apply changes.

marketplaceReturnsPage.title: Marketplace returns
marketplaceReturnsPage.restockConfirm: Return items from this order to stock? This increases local stock and pushes it to all marketplaces.

seoTemplatesPage.title: SEO templates
seoTemplatesPage.bulkGenTitle: Apply templates to all products without custom SEO
seoTemplatesPage.emptyHint: Templates auto-generate meta-title and description for products, categories and pages without custom SEO.
seoTemplatesPage.confirmGenMsg: Generate meta-title and description from templates for all products without custom SEO? Existing SEO fields are untouched.

marketplaceRepricingPage.title: Repricing rules
marketplaceRepricingPage.intro: Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom — first match wins. Stacks on top of the base markup from marketplace settings. Range: ±50%.
marketplaceRepricingPage.emptyHint: Add the first rule — e.g. «When stock < 5, lower the price by 10% to sell faster».

setup2faPage.loginRequired: Please log in to your account
setup2faPage.title: Account security
setup2faPage.introHint: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of protection. On login you will need to enter a 6-digit code from Google Authenticator or Authy.
setup2faPage.step1: 1. Scan the QR code in Google Authenticator:
setup2faPage.step2: 2. Enter the 6-digit code from the app:
setup2faPage.doneHint: From now on you will need to enter a code from the app on every login.
setup2faPage.backupHint: These codes can be used to sign in if you lose access to your phone. Each code is single-use.
setup2faPage.enabledStatus: Your account is protected by 2FA. On login you must enter a code from Google Authenticator.
setup2faPage.disableHint: Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm disabling 2FA.
setup2faPage.loadHistoryHint: Click «Load» to view recent logins to your account
setup2faPage.noActivityHint: No other logins to your account yet

emailTemplatesPage.title: Email templates
emailTemplatesPage.varsList: {{name}} — Name, {{orderNumber}} — Order number, {{status}} — Status, {{link}} — Link, {{amount}} — Amount, {{code}} — Promo code, {{discount}} — Discount, {{storeName}} — Store name
emailTemplatesPage.varsHint: Click «Preview» — variables get filled with sample values (name «Андрій», order «PT-2026-00123», etc.) for verification.
emailTemplatesPage.noVersions: No versions yet — each PUT creates a new version automatically.
emailTemplatesPage.restoreConfirm: Restore this version? Current state will be saved as a new version.
emailTemplatesPage.emptyHint: Templates are created automatically via migrations — if missing, check seed

adminBlogEditPage.enHint: Leave empty — /en/blog will fall back to the Ukrainian version.

segmentsPage.validateValues: Fill in values for all rules

marketplacesPage.pillDisputesTitle: Open customer disputes — require a response
marketplacesPage.pillParityTitle: Listings with outdated or unsynced prices

adminFeatureFlagsPage.title: Feature flags
adminFeatureFlagsPage.criticalConfirm:
You are about to DISABLE the critical feature flag «{key}».

This may immediately stop part of the prod site (payments, checkout, marketplace sync, etc).

Really continue?
adminFeatureFlagsPage.conflictToast: Another admin changed this flag — reload the page

adminIntegrationsPage.title: 1C / BAS Integration
adminIntegrationsPage.newKeyAlert: New API key created. Copy it now — it will not be shown again:
adminIntegrationsPage.errorLogEmpty: errorLog is empty — either error wasn't recorded, or completion is pending.
adminIntegrationsPage.deactivateConfirm:
Deactivate key {name}?

The integration using this key will stop working immediately and until re-enabled. Reversal is not available via UI — you will need to create a new key.

Continue?

adminCampaignsPage.title: Segment-based email campaigns
adminCampaignsPage.empty: No campaigns yet. Create your first campaign for automated sends by customer segment.
adminCampaignsPage.deleteConfirm: Delete campaign? Send logs will also be deleted.
adminCampaignsPage.sendNowTitle: Send the campaign immediately to all customers in the segment
adminCampaignsPage.sendConfirmMsg: It will go to all users in the selected segment, regardless of schedule. For one-off campaigns — users who already received it are skipped.
